acceptance_targets: [CH07-BKR-001] PASS if, in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:367-431, Anika takes one observable boundary action learned from Zoe before the chapter closes (spoken boundary, proactive outreach, or refusal pattern linked to lines 209-226); FAIL if the Zoe consequence remains only a short end-text after the father conflict.

[CH07-CRF-001] PASS if each cited beat contains at least one non-numeric stress cue and no beat contains more than one explicit time/calorie/rep calculation; FAIL if the revised passage still stacks multiple explicit calculations in each of those beats.

[FBR-006] PASS if the targeted lines no longer use the same 'abstract thing landed' template and each beat lands through a different mechanism visible on the page. FAIL if the formula remains in most targeted spans.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:367-431, Anika takes one observable boundary action learned from Zoe before the chapter closes (spoken boundary, proactive outreach, or refusal pattern linked to lines 209-226); FAIL if the Zoe consequence remains only a short end-text after the father conflict.
findings.problem: The chapter's core consequence (Zoe boundary repair) lands strongly in-scene, but the ending weight shifts to a long home-control reprise, so the friendship consequence is reduced to a brief late text exchange instead of a fully dramatized carry-forward action.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten repeated audit beats in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:323-347 and use the recovered space in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:367-431 to stage one explicit behavioral carry-forward from Zoe's boundary scene (set up at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:209-226), not just a reactive aftermath text.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each cited beat contains at least one non-numeric stress cue and no beat contains more than one explicit time/calorie/rep calculation; FAIL if the revised passage still stacks multiple explicit calculations in each of those beats.
findings.problem: Anika's stress mode is repeatedly rendered through explicit math/minute accounting. Because this token set appears in nearly every major beat, the pattern starts to feel mechanically imported from the stress-tell profile rather than dynamically evolving in-scene.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:3-9, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:125-129, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:253-257, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:433-434, keep only the most narratively necessary numeric beat and replace the others with non-numeric embodied pressure signals (breath, muscle guarding, compulsive gesture, sensory trigger tied to debt/grief stakes).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the targeted lines no longer use the same 'abstract thing landed' template and each beat lands through a different mechanism visible on the page. FAIL if the formula remains in most targeted spans.
findings.problem: Formula-impact phrasing recurs across chapters ('landed like...', 'sentence landed flat/heavy'), creating noticeable patterning instead of controlled motif.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the repeated abstract-impact constructions at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2542, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2829, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5993, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:7323 into varied consequence rendering (action interruption, breath shift, decision pivot, or dialogue break).

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
